missing_fielder_on_catch.strategy: No action needed (Store NULL if it ever happens).
missing_fielder_on_catch.reasoning: Across all 19 seasons, 0.0% of caught dismissals are missing fielder data. Cricsheet has retroactively populated this perfectly. If future data lacks a fielder, DB will store NULL and UI will show 'Unknown'.

matches_missing_innings_2.strategy: Flag as abandoned/no_result, but KEEP Innings 1.
matches_missing_innings_2.reasoning: These are real matches (e.g., rain abandoned after Innings 1). Deliveries in Innings 1 are still valid statistical events. They will be excluded from result-based aggregations (e.g., average when chasing), but kept in the main deliveries table.

over_count_mismatches_less_than_6_balls.reasoning: Manual inspection of match 829757 confirms these are NOT bugs. Overs naturally truncate when a team is bowled out (10th wicket) or when a team hits the winning runs mid-over.

is_legal_delivery.definition: A delivery is legal if the 'extras' object does NOT contain 'wides' or 'noballs'.
is_legal_delivery.purpose: Used to calculate balls faced for strike rate, economy rate, and over completion metrics.
